summary: Module 14 (Real-time Events) V2: Critical update to address the 'Stale Feed Risk' audit finding. Introduces 'The War Room' architecture primarily using Server-Sent Events (SSE) via FastAP. This allows for live updates of new posts, 'typing' indicators (e.g. 'Russia is drafting a declaration...'), and stats updates without page refreshes, creating a high-stakes, live simulation feel.
